     the Fermi energy is    -1.0810 ev

!    total energy              =  -10090.52840288 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          6.4E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.15120035 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
